headings.h1_classes: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-none text-balance

components_instructions.nav_bar: Sticky header with crystal glassmorphism (`backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70`). Nav links in dark blue `#1434cb`. Accent CTA button with golden yellow `#fdbb0a` background and `#050d33` text. Minimal 1px bottom border `border-slate-200/50`.
components_instructions.hero_section: Massive full-height dark section (`bg-[#1434cb]`). Use `cobe` library for the 3D globe visualization floating on the right/bottom. Floating '0.3s settlement' badges with glassmorphism `bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20`. Hero typography must be pure white with `#fdbb0a` accents. Overflow hidden.
components_instructions.trusted_by_marquee: Light background section. Use `react-fast-marquee`. 8-10 massive company logos using `react-icons/si` (SiShopify, SiAmazon, SiUber, SiAirbnb, SiGoogle, SiNetflix). Logos should be grayscale `text-slate-300` transitioning to `#1434cb` on hover. Generous spacing `gap-24`.
components_instructions.stats_section: Light background. 4 grid columns. Massive numbers (`text-5xl md:text-6xl`) in `#1434cb`, label text below in `text-slate-600`. Use `framer-motion` for staggered entrance when in view.
components_instructions.platform_capabilities: Bento grid mode. 4 cards: 2 large (col-span-12 md:col-span-8 and col-span-12 md:col-span-4), 2 small (col-span-12 md:col-span-6). Cards use 'Neumorphism tactile variant' on light background: `bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm`. Hover lift `-translate-y-1` and shadow increases to `shadow-xl`. Add subtle top highlight `border-t-2 border-t-[#1434cb]` to key cards.
components_instructions.treasury_cross_border: Two-column asymmetrical layout (5-col text, 7-col image). Left text, Right image. Use the provided `global_treasury_network` image with `rounded-3xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden`. Image should have a slight parallax effect or float using framer-motion.
components_instructions.developer_first: Retro-Futurism/Terminal look. Dark bento card `bg-[#050d33]` with `border border-[#1e3a8a]`. Code snippet displayed inside a mac-like terminal window with syntax highlighting colors (Pink/Yellow/Cyan on dark blue). Add a glowing beam effect on the border.
components_instructions.security_compliance: 4-column grid of trust badges using `lucide-react` (ShieldCheck, Lock, Globe, FileCheck). Centralized around 99.99% uptime and SOC2 compliance. High contrast geometric icons.
components_instructions.cta_section: Full width banner with the `fintech_background_texture` image overlaid as a background (`bg-cover bg-center`). Overlay `bg-[#1434cb]/80` to ensure text legibility. Text in white. Golden yellow primary button (`bg-[#fdbb0a] text-[#050d33]`). Massive bold statement.
components_instructions.footer: Generous spacing `py-32`. Deep blue background `#0a1966`. Grid layout for links. Big typography brand name 'UnifyBricks' at bottom in `#102693` (subtle watermark effect).

accessibility_testing.data_testids: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) must have role-based `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="nav-login-button"`, `data-testid="hero-cta-start"`).
accessibility_testing.contrast: Ensure golden yellow text is not placed on white backgrounds without sufficient contrast. Use it primarily for buttons with dark text, or on dark blue backgrounds.
